description:
Phase 2 makes current-branch workers actually launchable. After this phase, `/bw delegate` and `/bw run` can spawn workers that execute in the repo root without creating worktrees.

## Goals

1. Branch `launchTicketWorker()` by execution mode
2. In current-branch mode: resolve repo root, record `branchName` + `launchHead`, create runtime dirs, launch tmux at repo root
3. Enforce current-branch launch invariants (reject detached HEAD, tolerate dirty checkout, never create branch/worktree)
4. Generate current-branch-specific handoff prompts that instruct workers on atomic commits, ticket scoping, and `git commit <files> -m` pattern
5. Update all user-facing text/TUI from worktree-centric to mode-appropriate language

## Key Design Constraints

- Current-branch launch must NOT require a clean checkout — dirty/untracked state may belong to active workers
- Must reject detached HEAD unless explicitly configured
- Must record `branchName` and `launchHead` before tmux launch (observational metadata for attribution)
- Handoff prompt must instruct: `bw start`, no branch/PR/worktree creation, atomic ticket-referenced commits, specific file staging only, no broad `git add -A`/`git commit -a`, leave handoff comment, `bw close` + `bw sync`
- Worktree-mode launch must be preserved and callable through the same `prepareWorkerCheckout` path

## Files likely affected

- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/orchestrator.ts` — launch branching
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/handoff.ts` — current-branch prompt generation
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/tmux.ts` — cwd = repo root for current-branch
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/worktree.ts` — `prepareWorkerCheckout` current-branch path
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/tui/` — mode-appropriate labels
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/actions/delegate.ts` — launch flow
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/__tests__/` — launch regression tests

## Definition of Done

- `/bw delegate <ticket>` with `workerExecution.mode = "current-branch"` launches a tmux window at repo root
- No worktree or branch is created
- Runtime/log/scratch dirs exist
- Handoff prompt contains all required instructions
- Existing worktree launch still works when mode is `worktree`
- Tests prove: no `prepareTicketWorktree` call, cwd is repo root, dirty checkout doesn't fail launch, detached HEAD fails unless configured
- lint/test/typecheck pass clean
title: Phase 2: Current-branch launch — tmux at repo root, handoff prompt, no worktree
